form_name: F2S - Manage Lifecycle AFM - MM & SD Status

questions.text: The lifecycle stages include launch, active, end of life, and dead.
SD 20- Incomplete Master data  is used when the material is created in the system, but the Master data attributes are incomplete. Materials with this status are orderable.

SD 70- Discontinued is used when the material is discontinued. Ordering is allowed to continue to deplete any remaining stock and for certain types of processing ->Consignment Issue, Free Delivery, Liquidation, Destruction, Returns, Credit & Debit notes
SD status 45 is skipped during the substitution process if the substituted product is already at a higher status.
When a brand-new material with a brand new EAN is created, how does its SD status transition after master data is complete?
options: It goes directly from status 20 to status 50.
It transitions from status 10 to status 30.
It moves directly from status 20 to status 40.
It remains at status 20 until further notice.
